start.welcome_new:
Welcome to fxBot — the world-class interface for f(x) Protocol.

🔐 Non-custodial. Zero key custody. Trustless automation.

portfolio.title: 📊 Portfolio for {wallet}
portfolio.no_positions:
No active positions.

Use /trade to open a leveraged position or /mint to borrow fxUSD.

trade.preview:
⚡ *Trade Preview*

Market: {market} {side}
Leverage: {leverage}x
Collateral: {amount} ETH
Slippage: {slippage}%

Tap to confirm and sign:

limit.usage:
Usage: /limit <open|close> <market> <long|short> at <price>

Example: /limit open wstETH long at 2800

orders.title: 🎯 Your Limit Orders
orders.no_orders: No limit orders. Use /limit to place one.

mint.preview:
🏦 *fxMINT Preview*

Collateral: {collateral} {market}
Borrow: {mintAmount} fxUSD

Tap to confirm:

security.title: 🔒 Security Center
security.audits:
*Audits:*
• Trail of Bits (Apr 2024, Jul 2024)
• OpenZeppelin (Aug 2025)
• Secbit (Oct 2025)
security.policies:
*Policies:*
• Zero key custody — keys in Privy TEE
• Automation policy: default-deny, user-revocable
• Daily tx cap: 50

help.title: 📚 fxBot Commands
help.trading:
*Trading:*
/trade — Open leveraged position
/limit — Place limit/stop orders
/orders — View active orders
/mint or /borrow — Borrow fxUSD
/redeem — Redeem fxUSD
/repay — Repay fxUSD debt
help.yield:
*Yield & Governance:*
/save — fxSAVE deposit/withdraw
/lock — Lock FXN → veFXN
/vote — Gauge voting
/claim — Claim rewards
help.portfolio:
*Portfolio:*
/portfolio — View positions
/deposit — Show wallet address + QR
/withdraw — Send to external address
/bridge — Bridge fxUSD
help.settings:
*Settings:*
/settings — Language, slippage, MEV
/security — Policies, audits
/help — This menu

errors.no_wallet: Please connect your wallet first with /start
errors.invalid_leverage: Leverage must be between 1.1x and {max}x for {side}
errors.rate_limited: Too many requests. Please wait a moment.
